LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-07-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT HYUNDAI MOTOR AMERICA'S MOTION TO COMPEL BINDING ARBITRATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) (COURTESY COPIES). THE MOTION MAY BE RE-SET FOR HEARING ON A MON.-THUR. AFTER AUGUST 15. PAPERS SHALL BEAR THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-07-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT HYUNDAI MOTOR AMERICA's Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). The motion may be re-set for hearing on a Mon.-Thur. after August 15. Papers shall bear the new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
